allow: Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT status_venda, COUNT\(*\) n, COUNT\(DISTINCT orcamento_id\) orcs FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.diego_barros_inteligencia_comercial_e_mercado.df_waves_vendas WHERE data >= add_months\(date_trunc\('MM', current_date\(\)\), -1\) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 30" --max 30)

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT 'waves' t, CAST\(MIN\(data\) AS STRING\) min_d, CAST\(MAX\(data\) AS STRING\) max_d, COUNT\(*\) n FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.diego_barros_inteligencia_comercial_e_mercado.df_waves_vendas UNION ALL SELECT 'desempenho_hc', CAST\(MIN\(data\) AS STRING\), CAST\(MAX\(data\) AS STRING\), COUNT\(*\) FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.diego_barros_inteligencia_comercial_e_mercado.desempenho_hc UNION ALL SELECT 'vw_hc_zerado', CAST\(MIN\(data\) AS STRING\), CAST\(MAX\(data\) AS STRING\), COUNT\(*\) FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.projeto_brisa_performance.vw_hc_zerado_vendedor" --max 5)

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT CAST\(MIN\(data\) AS STRING\) min_d, CAST\(MAX\(data\) AS STRING\) max_d FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.diego_barros_inteligencia_comercial_e_mercado.df_waves_vendas" --max 2)

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT status_venda, COUNT\(*\) n FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.diego_barros_inteligencia_comercial_e_mercado.df_waves_vendas GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20" --max 20)

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT CAST\(MIN\(data\) AS STRING\) min_d, CAST\(MAX\(data\) AS STRING\) max_d FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.diego_barros_inteligencia_comercial_e_mercado.desempenho_hc" --max 2)

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT CAST\(MIN\(data\) AS STRING\) min_d, CAST\(MAX\(data\) AS STRING\) max_d FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.projeto_brisa_performance.vw_hc_zerado_vendedor" --max 2)
Bash(rm -f .databricks-oauth-cache.json.bak .databricks-oauth-cache.json.expired && ls -la .databricks-oauth-cache.json 2>/dev/null && echo "cache valido mantido; temporarios removidos")

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT permissao, usuario_ativo, COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM \\`gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev\\`.\\`projeto_brisa_performance\\`.\\`cadastro_usuario\\` GROUP BY permissao, usuario_ativo ORDER BY n DESC")

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT gestorfuncional, coordenacao, supervisao, nome_consultor, matricula, hash_consultor, CPF, email_colaborador, lideranca FROM \\`gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev\\`.\\`projeto_brisa_performance\\`.\\`vw_hc_zerado_vendedor\\` LIMIT 5")
Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM \\`gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev\\`.\\`projeto_brisa_performance\\`.\\`vw_hc_zerado_vendedor\\` WHERE data >= '2026-05-01'")

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT MATRICULA, NOME, cidade_atuacao_jwas, UF, GERENCIA, COORDENACAO, RESPSUPERVISAO, GERENTE_CANAL, GERENTE_ORG, nicho, canal_jwas, situacao_jwas, nivel, TEMPO_EMPRESA, CAST\(ADMISSAO AS STRING\) adm, TIPO_CIDADE FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.diego_barros_inteligencia_comercial_e_mercado.desempenho_hc WHERE data = \(SELECT MAX\(data\) FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.diego_barros_inteligencia_comercial_e_mercado.desempenho_hc\) AND NOME IS NOT NULL LIMIT 3" --max 3)

Bash(node scripts/query-databricks.mjs "SELECT servico, COUNT\(*\) n FROM gdb_brisanet_comunidade_dev.projeto_brisa_performance.vw_hc_zerado_vendedor WHERE data >= date_trunc\('MM', current_date\(\)\) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 20" --max 20)
